description: Brand social hashtag on share posts; lowercase, one word, never translated.
User account. Keep «Аккаунт» (not «Учётная запись») for consistency.
The achievements screen / section (the gamification feature).
Tracking-category umbrella for alcoholic drinks (stats / summary / Health export) — distinct from the specific rows beer / wine / strong alcohol.
Apple's app marketplace, named in billing / subscription copy. Verbatim.

Apple's health-data platform the app syncs with; kept verbatim as the integration brand (corpus is uniformly 'Apple Health'). NOTE Apple's RU name for the Health *app* is «Здоровье» — consider it for app-reference copy in pass-2; «Apple Health» stays the integration/brand name.
Apple account named in billing / restore-purchase copy. Verbatim.
Apple's smartwatch; the app ships a Watch app. Verbatim.

FORBIDDEN on the EN source side: use 'app', not 'application', in user-facing text (hard convention). RU «приложение» is correct and is NOT banned — this entry carries no ru form, so only the en source is gated.
Subscription auto-renewal (formal subscription-terms register).
An earned award item — distinct from the 'Achievements' screen. («награда», not «достижение».)
Fixed drink type (salted yogurt drink).
Fixed alcoholic drink type in the beverage catalog / drink picker.
The user's body in self-care framing ('your body will thank you'). «организм» is dominant; «тело» is acceptable in warmer copy.
Recurring store disclosure. Register varies: warm CTA «отменишь в любой момент» (T-form) vs formal «отмена в любое время».
Length unit — centimetres (height step).
Fixed drink type. Distinct from 'hot chocolate'.
Fixed drink type. Pin the full phrase to keep distinct from base 'water'.
Fixed drink type.
FORBIDDEN — clinical / IT jargon for drink history. Prefer 'your drinks', 'drink history', 'what you've added'.
Fixed drink type. EN 'Cranberry drink' renders the Slavic «Морс» (any berry/fruit drink) — confirm the EN pivot for non-RU languages in pass 2.
The personalized per-day water target (main screen, onboarding goal-calc, settings). Legacy «дневная норма» must not be reintroduced.
Fixed drink type: decaffeinated coffee. (Legacy key stem 'Cicoriy' = chicory no longer matches the meaning.)

NOUN — a logged beverage entry (also the rendering of source 'beverage') → «напиток». The VERB sense 'to drink' renders by aspect: «пей» (imperative) / «выпей» (perfective) / «пить» (infinitive) — context-dependent, not one fixed form.
Imperative verb. Keep «Изменить» (not «Редактировать»).
Keep «Email» (not «Эл. почта»/«Почта») for consistency in auth copy.
Fixed drink type; colloquial «энергетик». The onboarding category phrase «энергетические напитки» is separate copy.
Social network for sharing / social-proof copy. Verbatim.
Volume unit — US fluid ounces (imperial system).
Non-water liquids collectively; use when the source means fluids beyond water. Contrast «вода».
The free trial period before billing. Warm in CTAs, formal in terms.
Social friends list.
LEGACY label for the paid tier; superseded by 'My Water Premium'. Flag in new strings.
Weight / nutrient unit — grams (sugar, caffeine).
A glass of water — quick-add measure and the recurring 'glass of water' phrase. Norm «стакан»; the diminutive «стаканчик» is banned (familiarity, TRANSLATION_STYLE.md § Фамильярность).
The user's daily water target; CURRENT term, and the recurring UI label 'Goal'. Legacy «норма» is retired — do not reintroduce.
The healthy water-drinking habit the app helps build.
Health-framing adjective (healthy lifestyle / habit). The noun 'health' = «здоровье».
Fixed drink sub-type under tea.
Fixed drink type, distinct from cocoa («какао»).

Fine, widely-used EN word ('Hydration today', 'Daily hydration'). It has NO fixed RU headword — render via «вода» / «выпито» / «прогресс»; do NOT calque to «гидратация» on casual surfaces. Allowed in EN (not forbidden — that would flag the legitimate source).
FORBIDDEN — clinical / analytics jargon. Prefer plain 'your water', 'how much you drank', 'today's progress'.
Measurement-system option label (imperial). NOTE: a corpus 'Metric' key exists but no 'Imperial' key — confirm whether the label is missing or derived.
Amount consumed per day. Recommend «дневной объём» / «дневная цель»; avoid the clinical calque «потребление воды».
Apple device name in Watch-sync / setup copy. Verbatim (same do-not-translate convention covers iPad / iOS).
Fixed drink type.
Fixed drink type (fermented milk drink).
Weight unit — kilograms (metric).
Fixed drink type (starch-thickened fruit drink); Slavic transliteration.

Fixed drink type (fermented tea). RU = «комбуча» (the modern drink name — lowercase common noun, like the other beverages), NOT «Чайный гриб» (which names the SCOBY organism). Corpus key 'combucha' to be re-aligned.
Fixed drink type (fruit compote drink). EN headword is the transliteration 'Kompot', not English 'compote'.
Fixed drink type (fermented bread drink); Slavic transliteration — fix the EN headword so targets transliterate consistently.
Volume unit — litres. Abbreviation form, no trailing period.
Weight unit — pounds (imperial).
Fixed drink type. Keep distinct from 'soda' = «газировка».
Healthy / active lifestyle framing in reminders and onboarding.

iOS lock-screen / Dynamic Island live-update feature showing hydration progress. Apple's official RU term is «Эфир активности» (Apple iPhone User Guide, support.apple.com/ru-ru) — use it, NOT verbatim 'Live Activities' nor the corpus drift «Live-активности».

t_notes.ru: Официальный термин Apple (руководство iPhone). Сверить точную подпись тумблера в Настройках iOS перед pass-2; реконсилить дрейф «Live-активности» в корпусе.

description: VERB — record a drink to the day's history → «записывать» / «записать». Often interchangeable with 'add' = «добавить»; 'log out' = «выйти» is separate.
Imperative verb — sign out. «Выйти» (not «Выход» noun). Pairs with 'log in'.
Fixed drink type (yerba mate). The translator note should clarify it is the drink, not the address term.
FORBIDDEN — formal medical jargon; no such feature exists. (The plain word 'metabolism' is fine.)
Measurement-system option label (metric).
Nutrient unit — milligrams (caffeine).
Fixed drink type.
Fixed drink type. Pin the full phrase so it stays distinct from 'protein shake' (both share «коктейль»).
Fixed drink type, distinct from plain water.
Volume unit — millilitres. Abbreviation form, no trailing period.
OVERLOADED — «Подробнее» (learn more) vs «Больше»/«Ещё» (more items). Pick by sense; default «Подробнее» for the link sense.

App/brand name; canonical in-app display name (CFBundleDisplayName/appName) and store listing. RU = «Моя вода» (dominant + authoritative). Latin 'My Water' and one-word 'MyWater' are drift to fix in the corpus. Non-Latin scripts (ar/hi/ja/ko/zh) decided in pass 2.
Current name of the paid subscription tier (replaces legacy 'Full version'). Keep verbatim.
Fixed drink type.
Settings section / system notifications.
Toggle OFF state. «Выкл.» (abbrev, Apple iOS RU form with trailing period) — pair with 'On' = «Вкл.».
Toggle ON state. «Вкл.» (abbrev, Apple iOS RU form with trailing period) — pair with 'Off' = «Выкл.».
Weight unit — ounces (imperial).
Standalone premium subscription/feature. Keep Latin 'Premium'; RU inflects around it («подписка Premium»).
Legal document title. Register: formal.
The user profile screen / section.
Advancement toward the daily goal (rings / charts / widgets). NOTE the weight context uses «динамика», not «прогресс».
Fixed drink type. The «протеиновый» modifier keeps it distinct from milkshake.
Core feature — a drink reminder. Plural 'Reminders' = «Напоминания».
Restore a previous purchase / subscription (App Store).
Imperative verb. Generic save action across forms (profile / drink editor / settings).
Imperative verb — choose one. Keep «Выбрать» (not «Выделить» = highlight).
The settings screen.
Apple's Shortcuts app. Use Apple's OFFICIAL RU app name «Быстрые команды» (vendor-fixed translation, not verbatim).
Account registration. Noun «Регистрация» for the screen; «Зарегистрироваться» for the button verb.
Apple's voice assistant; the app ships a Siri shortcut to log a drink. Verbatim.
Fixed drink type.
Fixed drink type. Keep distinct from 'lemonade' = «лимонад» (they collide in some locales).
Settings row — notification / app sound. The loudness sense is «громкость»; complements the Volume entry's not-loudness guard.
Fixed liquid-intake type (corpus key 'Boullion', EN 'Soup'). Logged as a fluid source.
Fixed drink type (isotonic).
Weight unit — stone (British). Rare.

t_notes.ru: Брит. единица веса. Пишем словом «стоун»: двухбуквенное «ст» коллидирует со «столовая ложка» (ст. л.) и «стакан» (ст.). Подтвердить отображение в iOS-пикере единиц.

description: The statistics screen / section.

Consecutive days the daily goal was met (gamification). «дни подряд» for the inflected count ('5 дней подряд'); «серия» stays acceptable for a bare stat label and possessive ('твоя серия', 'не прерывай серию') — see ru note. Not a hard one-form rule.

t_notes.ru: «дни подряд» — для счётной формы (5 дней подряд; инфлексия день/дня/дней). «серия» — ок для компактного лейбла и притяжательных конструкций («твоя серия», «не прерывай серию»), где «дни подряд» грамматически не ложится. Не загонять «дни подряд» в голый заголовок силой.

description: Fixed drink type (spirits).
The paid subscription. Register varies: warm T-form in CTAs, formal in subscription terms.
Fixed drink type.
Legal document title. Register: formal (impersonal-first).
AMBIGUOUS — date header / period-filter option / relative-day label. Confirm role per key.
VERB — to track / monitor a metric (water / weight / alcohol). The noun 'tracker' = «трекер» is a separate entry.
NOUN — the app as a 'water tracker' (marketing / title surfaces). Loanword «трекер».
Settings label for the measurement-system section.
VKontakte — RU-market social login + share target. Verbatim.
Water VOLUME (amount). NOT loudness «громкость» — do not confuse.

The core substance the app tracks: default liquid, #1 drink-picker row, core domain noun, and root of the brand. RU «вода» inflects by case (воды/воду) — grammar, not a different rendering. Pinned once across domain + beverage; the Water2 widget placeholder is excluded.
The per-drink hydration-coefficient feature label (drink-settings screen) and an ASO keyword (store title 'My Water Balance'). NOT a blanket clinical term — see the ru note.

t_notes.ru: ОК на App Store / ASO (поисковые слова) и на экране настройки напитка (там это параметр, серьёзная поверхность). НЕ использовать в casual-текстах (push / motivational / tips) — там простое «вода» / «пей воду».

description: Body weight — a secondary tracked metric. (Weight UNITS kg / lb / st are separate unit entries.)
Home-screen / lock-screen widget.
Fixed alcoholic drink type.
Fixed drink type (drinkable yogurt).
FORBIDDEN (RU calque) — clinical rendering of 'hydration' on casual surfaces. The en word 'hydration' is fine; only this RU calque is banned. Use «вода» / «выпито» / «прогресс».
FORBIDDEN (RU calque) — non-standard clinical calque of 'consumption'. Use plain «вода» / «выпито».
FORBIDDEN (RU calque) — Apple Health's formal term, clinical for our friendly tracker. Use «вода» / «дневной объём» / «цель».
